description: Regulatory Mechanical Ethics registry for EthicBit / CEMU.

rules.description: All regulatory relevant outputs must preserve complete traceability to underlying inputs, rules, and control decisions.
rules.justification: Sin trazabilidad regulatoria completa no es posible demostrar cumplimiento, responder a requerimientos ni sostener supervisión externa.

rules.description: All regulatory compliance determinations must be reproducible from preserved evidence, policy state, and execution context.
rules.justification: Sin reproducibilidad de las determinaciones regulatorias no puede existir validación independiente robusta ni supervisión técnica confiable.

rules.description: All regulatory findings must expose clear justification and reviewable explanation for supervisory interpretation.
rules.justification: Hallazgos regulatorios opacos dificultan revisión, contradicción técnica y gobernanza institucional.
